name: Reflection (反思经验)
description: 反思经验沉淀：记录反馈、查询经验，并把经验编译成可复用策略。

routeSpecs.description: List, search, filter, or summarize learned experiences.
Record one learned experience or workload feedback item.
Compile learned experiences into reusable strategy hints.

metadata.note: Natively owns /v1/reflect/* through the Pack Runtime gate. Shares the canonical ReflectiveLoop and ExperienceStore; no separate menu because Chat/feedback/Cogni surfaces consume these APIs.
metadata.usageSurface: 记忆页、任务反馈与经验策略
metadata.example1: 把用户反馈记录成可查询经验。
metadata.example2: 从历史任务里沉淀可复用策略。
metadata.example3: 让后续任务避免重复犯同类错误。
